subject: TICKETS: GA GOP Defend the Majority Rally with Vice President Pence for Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cb99565a14d4/tickets-ga-gop-defend-the-majority-rally-with-vice-president-pence-for-senators-david-perdue-and-kelly-loeffler?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Hey there,

As we continue to unite behind Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler and encourage Georgians to get out the vote, we hope you'll join us for a **Defend the Majority Rally with Vice President Mike Pence.**
The two rallies, which will take place on Friday, November 20, will highlight the importance of **holding the line** in the U.S. Senate with honored speaker Vice President Pence, special guests Senator David Perdue and Senator Kelly Loeffler, and PSC Commissioner Bubba McDonald.
**_Friday, November 20, 2020_** **12:30 pm** **Cherokee County Rally with Vice President Mike Pence ** _[TICKETS HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=0c7af9bf11&e=02cd889ad3)_ Cherokee Conference Center (The Bluffs) 1130 Bluffs Parkway Canton, GA 30114 **3:15 pm** **Hall County Rally with Vice President Mike Pence ** _[TICKETS HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=57021d04f4&e=02cd889ad3)_ Chicopee Woods Agricultural Center 1855 Calvary Church Road Gainesville, GA 30507

Folks, the future of our country is at stake. _**Thank you**_ for your vital work and support to defend our majority.
\- Team Perdue ###

It’s been heartwarming to see all of the tremendous support across the Nation from great American Patriots, like YOU. Organic rallies have been springing up all over the Country in support of yours truly - incredible!

I promise you we are fighting to ensure EVERY SINGLE LEGAL ballot is counted. I have legal teams on the ground in every critical state. All I need now is YOUR SUPPORT.

body:
[Senate Conservatives Fund]

Peter:

Conservatives across the nation are standing with President Trump
in the fight for election integrity. While the media
establishment may think they get to decide the winners of our
elections, the people in our country decide once every legal vote
is counted.

In addition to upholding our election laws, we also need to STOP
CHUCK SCHUMER AND THE DEMOCRATS FROM TAKING CONTROL OF THE
SENATE. To do that, we need to win at least one of the two Senate
runoff elections in Georgia on January 5th.

PLEASE JOIN US IN SUPPORTING SENATORS DAVID PERDUE (R-GA) AND
KELLY LOEFFLER (R-GA) WITH A SPLIT CONTRIBUTION TODAY!
(HTTPS://SECURE.WINRED.COM/SCF/2020-GEORGIA-RUNOFF?UTM_SOURCE=REVV&UTM_MEDIUM=EMAIL&UTM_CAMPAIGN=21AB0E90B6319E2255D18D328646288D)

If the Democrats take over the Senate, they will abolish the
filibuster, grant statehood to DC and Puerto Rico, and expand the
seats in our courts so they can pack them with liberal activists.

THEY WANT TO PASS THE GREEN NEW DEAL, GUN CONFISCATION, OPEN
BORDERS AND TO DEFUND THE POLICE!!

We must act now to create a conservative firewall in the Senate
to stop the liberals from destroying our country.

AND WE NEED TO SEND THE LIBERAL ESTABLISHMENT A MESSAGE. We are
disgusted by the lack of election integrity in our country and we
will do everything we can to defeat those who sit on their hands
and pretend this isn't a problem.

Voter turnout in the Georgia runoff elections will be much lower
than the presidential election, which means conservatives have an
opportunity to utterly crush the Democrats.

PLEASE DO YOUR PART AND HELP US START A RED WAVE FOR
CONSERVATIVES IN 2022 THAT STARTS IN GEORGIA.
(HTTPS://SECURE.WINRED.COM/SCF/2020-GEORGIA-RUNOFF?UTM_SOURCE=REVV&UTM_MEDIUM=EMAIL&UTM_CAMPAIGN=21AB0E90B6319E2255D18D328646288D)

Our country is too great and our freedoms are too sacred to give
up without a fight. The Democrats may think they have won, but
this isn't over and we have just gotten started!

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so
much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

[Mary Vought Signature]

Mary Vought

Executive Director

Senate Conservatives Fund

RUNOFF COUNTDOWN

[motionmailapp.com]

SUPPORT THESE CANDIDATES TODAY

[2020 Georgia Runoff Candidates]

SAVE THE SENATE
(https://secure.winred.com/scf/2020-georgia-runoff?utm_source=revv&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=21ab0e90b6319e2255d18d328646288d)

Senate Conservatives Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that
promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative
candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator
Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible
as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or
foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not
permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing
address, occupation and employer for each individual whose
contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not
paid for at taxpayer expense.

body:
They're trying to divide us. We won't allow it. |
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=efc6ec0a58&e=3e017fab0f)

---
| Dear *|FNAME|*,

During our Senate campaign, you may remember that Phil Murphy's Attorney General Gurbir Grewal attacked our campaign.

But now, Grewal has joined with left-wing Attorneys General led by Minnesota's radical former congressman Keith Ellison to attack U.S. Attorney General Bill Barr for investigating voter fraud in the presidential election.

Grewal has signed on to a sanctimonious letter saying that Barr's directive to root out fraud could "create the appearance of political involvement in elections."

But this is the same Grewal, the same bully who tried to intimidate me with a bogus "Cease and Desist" letter attempting to restrict what I could and could not say about my liberal opponent in the election for United States Senate.

## Grewal's letter was nothing less than "clear political intrusion in the electoral process" just days before Election Day.
---
| [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=3bdef8866d&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE NOW")
---
| Now Grewal has the gall to deride those of us who want to know what happened in the Presidential election, where the votes came from that eliminated President Trump's commanding election night lead, and -- most of all -- who is counting the votes and verifying the voters.

Murphy and Grewal attacked us; now they're attacking Bill Barr. Imagine what they'll do next year when Murphy himself is on the ballot for re-election.

We can't stand idly by while Murphy, Grewal and the rest of the Democrat Party continue to employ intimidation tactics to ensure President Trump loses this year and Murphy wins next year.

We need to restore integrity to our elections -- that's why I'm running for Governor.

Your support now will mean all the difference is getting off to a strong start and building the conservative engine we need to send Phil Murphy packing.
---
| [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=281df42883&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE NOW")
---
| Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**
_For the People_
Republican for New Jersey Governor
---
| **P.S.** Murphy and Grewal tried to intimate us during the Senate race and now they're trying to intimidate Bill Barr. But I won't be deterred and I know you won't either. Chip-in now to join our movement to stop Phil Murphy and take back New Jersey
---
| [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=06ecac6879&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE NOW")

Friend,

The Fake recount going on in Georgia means nothing because they are not allowing signatures to be looked at and verified.

Georgia’s Secretary of State won’t let the people checking the ballots see the signatures for fraud. Why? Without this, the whole process is very unfair and close to meaningless. Everyone knows that WE won the state, NOT Joe Biden.

The American People, especially the great People of Georgia, want a FAIR and TRANSPARENT RECOUNT. We are fighting to protect the integrity of this Election, but my team can’t do it without you.

I need YOU to step up and make sure we have the resources to FIGHT BACK against this phony recount.

name: Team Stanton
subject: Demand Trump honor the election results NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend,

Despite our differences, we agree that we have to honor the democratic process, and that means accepting the will of the people. It is what makes us American. **[Will you sign on to demand that President Trump concede to President-elect Biden and accept the decision that the American people made on November 3?](https://act.myngp.com/el/v8GoXsIlI_jwlNzRUTzLXL2CYBXqVMEnDDirJ3BbX9w=/_KwNQ9wQuyFHkASbr1g3-wP7Fsd9d9424qrU-nRwZvw=)**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/v8GoXsIlI_jwlNzRUTzLXL2CYBXqVMEnDDirJ3BbX9w=/_KwNQ9wQuyFHkASbr1g3-wP7Fsd9d9424qrU-nRwZvw=)

We will have to work together to heal our country's divisions, and that starts with honoring our electoral process. Thank you for doing your part to demand that we honor our American institutions, and affirm the people's decision to make Joe Biden the 46th president.

Thanks for your support,

\-- _Team Stanton_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Georgia needs our help!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

As we all take a moment to pause following the Presidential election, it's important to remember that our work is not done. We have yet another critical election coming up on January 5, 2021.

In the recent Georgia Senate elections, no candidate was able to secure a minimum 50 percent of the votes needed in order to win the election, so Georgia state law mandates all candidates will advance to a runoff election.

**We have an incredible opportunity on our hands.**

Two Democratic Senate candidates in Georgia, Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff, advanced to the January 5th runoff elections. Right now, we have a chance to flip the Senate and we have to do everything possible to make it happen!

No one expected Georgia to flip to blue in the Presidential election, but more voters turned out to demand change. We need to keep the momentum going in the upcoming runoffs so we have a productive Congress. [**_Sign up to volunteer for the Georgia runoffs._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21616059/261493418/703409997?gxids=7757&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmIwM2ViZS0wOTI5LWViMTEtOWZiNC0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DamLLw8t8rs8_6D8NzM2qzdNM6tTFHZIjHcqFNlQZlQ=&emci=5166c912-0929-eb11-9fb4-00155d03affc&emdi=3bb03ebe-0929-eb11-9fb4-00155d03affc&ceid=2678920)
**[SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21616060/261493419/703409997?gxids=7757&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmIwM2ViZS0wOTI5LWViMTEtOWZiNC0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DamLLw8t8rs8_6D8NzM2qzdNM6tTFHZIjHcqFNlQZlQ=&emci=5166c912-0929-eb11-9fb4-00155d03affc&emdi=3bb03ebe-0929-eb11-9fb4-00155d03affc&ceid=2678920)**
We can’t allow for Mitch McConnell to continue his ruthless leadership in the Senate, where he ignores the needs of millions of Americans and sacrifices our democratic values.

We need all the help we can get so that Joe Biden can get work done in the White House to protect our healthcare, safeguard our democracy, and address climate change.

[**_We don’t have much time left before the elections, that’s why we need all hands on deck. Join me in supporting Warnock and Ossoff’s campaigns by volunteering for the Georgia runoffs →_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21616061/261493420/703409997?gxids=7757&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmIwM2ViZS0wOTI5LWViMTEtOWZiNC0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DamLLw8t8rs8_6D8NzM2qzdNM6tTFHZIjHcqFNlQZlQ=&emci=5166c912-0929-eb11-9fb4-00155d03affc&emdi=3bb03ebe-0929-eb11-9fb4-00155d03affc&ceid=2678920)

Thank you,
Mike

| Folks,

Right now, it’s critical that we unite behind Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler to ensure they are re-elected to the U.S. Senate and **protect our majority.** This Thursday, **Senator Tom Cotton** will join Senators Perdue and Loeffler for a Save our Majority Rally – a unique opportunity to hear from David, Kelly, and Tom, and _stand with them as they stand up against the radical Left._ Bring your friends, your family, and join us in showing support for our last line of defense, our U.S. Senators from the great state of Georgia. **_Event Details_**
**Thursday, November 19, 2020
3:00 pm** Georgia National Fairgrounds 401 Golden Isles Pkwy, Perry, GA 31069

body:
Our hearts sank when we saw the latest polling in the Georgia Senate runoffs. Both races are too close to call! Liberals from around the country -- including Chuck Schumer, AOC, Barack Obama, Stacey Abrams, and Joe Biden -- are pulling out ALL THE STOPS to defeat David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler in these must-win seats.

name: Tim Scott
subject: Georgia on my mind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
%%First Name%%, I've got Georgia on my mind. Despite falsely claiming to be the Peach State (South Carolina ACTUALLY produces more peaches), I have been thinking a lot about Georgia lately.
Friend,

I've got Georgia on my mind.

Despite falsely claiming to be the Peach State (South Carolina ACTUALLY produces more peaches), I have been thinking a lot about Georgia lately.

Let me explain.

The Senate Majority will be decided by TWO senate runoff elections in January. If the Democrats win, Chuck Schumer will take over as Senate Majority leader.

All of our conservative victories from the last few years will be reversed if we allow the Democrats to win in Georgia.

We simply cannot lose. [**Friend, will you step up and make the most generous donation you can afford to help us win in Georgia?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/georgia-liberal-megadonors/?utm_campaign=20201117_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1040987-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201117_georgia-on-my-mind)

[DONATE](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/georgia-liberal-megadonors/?utm_campaign=20201117_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1040987-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201117_georgia-on-my-mind)
---

In the last election, Democrats massively outraised Republicans in races all across the country. Those same liberal donors are ALL-IN to win in Georgia and turn the Senate BLUE.

Regardless of where you live, these races in Georgia are important for the future of our country. [**Can you step up and make a generous donation to help us win in Georgia?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/georgia-liberal-megadonors/?utm_campaign=20201117_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1040987-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201117_georgia-on-my-mind)

[DONATE](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/georgia-liberal-megadonors/?utm_campaign=20201117_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1040987-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201117_georgia-on-my-mind)
---

While the State of Georgia may falsely claim to be the Peach State, there is no disputing the fact that the Senate runoffs in Georgia will determine control of the Senate.

I am committed to doing all I can to ensure we hold the Republican Majority; [**will you chip in and help?**](http://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/georgia-liberal-megadonors/?utm_campaign=20201117_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1040987-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201117_georgia-on-my-mind)

Tim Scott

P.S. Just to set the record straight, in 2019 South Carolina produced 75,000 tons of peaches while Georgia only produced 39,000 tons. Despite these facts, we still need to help hold the GOP Majority in Georgia. [**Chip in Now.**](http://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/georgia-liberal-megadonors/?utm_campaign=20201117_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1040987-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201117_georgia-on-my-mind)

body:

Friend,

**Democrats on Capitol Hill are having a full-blown identity crisis in front of the whole country.**

_Half of them are just now waking up to the fact that their ultra-progressive agenda to defund the police is what led to Republicans taking a massive chunk out of their majority on Election Day._

_Meanwhile, the other half (led by AOC and the Squad) is digging their heels in and taking their gloves off as they fight to pull their party as far Left as it can possibly go._

body:
I am so grateful.
Friends,
Unfortunately we were unable to gain any new Democrat U.S. Congressional seats from Texas but the fight for change is far from over. I am so grateful to everyone who voted for us, every single volunteer, and every person who worked relentlessly on our campaign.
I want to thank the tens of thousands of grassroots donors who made all of this possible. I am humbled by the support of so many elected officials and former candidates. Thank you for everything!
Despite being outspent by over a million dollars and a delayed runoff which limited the time for outreach in the general race, we got nearly 40,000 more votes than any other U.S. Congressional Democratic nominee in this district.
In the next few days I will be doing a data deep dive into the Texas U.S. Congressional races to show what we have learned and what we must do to win Texas.

Donna started her tech career as the first female design engineer ever hired in the 100 year history of Duncan Metering. After all, Republicans that don’t vote elect Democrats. **[This will only take a moment, Peter, but we just have to know: did you vote in the 2020 Election? Take this quick one-question survey and let us know.](https://go.electrepublicans.org/2020-voter-survey-ujinn7i3xc69v9b8hb24?e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=any_p&n=3)** Official 2020 Voter Survey **SUPPORTER ID:** #040945
**DEADLINE:** 11:59 PM TONIGHT | | [Take The Survey](https://go.electrepublicans.org/2020-voter-survey-ujinn7i3xc69v9b8hb24?e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=any_p&n=4)
---
As we look ahead to the Georgia Runoff Election, we need to be sure that we replicate the same levels of Republican voting that we saw in November.
In fact, we need our vote totals to be _**EVEN BIGGER**_.
**But first, we need to confirm which Republicans voted and which stayed home. Did you vote, Peter? Please, let us know right away.**
**[https://go.electrepublicans.org/2020-voter-survey-ujinn7i3xc69v9b8hb24](https://go.electrepublicans.org/2020-voter-survey-ujinn7i3xc69v9b8hb24?utm_campaign=any_p&utm_source=hddata&utm_medium=email&sc=hd&amt1=5&amt2=10&amt3=25&amt4=50&amt5=100&amt6=250&amt7=500&utm_content=text_text-base-url&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&address=&zip=34223&city=Englewood&employer_name=&occupation=&phone=&mobile=&oc=true&money_bomb=false&recurring=false&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=any_p&n=5)**
Thank you.
_\-- Elect Republicans_

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: WHILE WARNOCK WANTS TO TAKE AWAY PRIVATE INSURANCE, LOEFFLER'S HEALTHCARE PLAN LOWERS COSTS AND COVERS PRE-EXISTING CONDITIONS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 17, 2020 WHILE WARNOCK WANTS TO TAKE AWAY PRIVATE INSURANCE, LOEFFLER'S HEALTHCARE PLAN LOWERS COSTS AND COVERS PRE-EXISTING CONDITIONS
ATLANTA - Last night, Raphael Warnock hosted a healthcare roundtable where he again [highlighted](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l6IC4FT5WEyMnswJLFZRmRfkUQc3tc9ChP5O2AaVZpHkc2EAA9gRd_INaXf7rHVm-9MX7Lk9sNEKbEziZzyygI-QOY0KNNsqMhlF1DW9F_ME7eobUo4ZTBGglPlsdmX5EmFnR6n6otLu4b328oOWW_Mhd9McdAraow7-v0GMs8UCnqXePuItjZg5giw_QGQyul00I5_qm9z6wbnsbpuCirI1RSX6rh6D&c=9ouAnxm9CRDj7LtdxRJW1U2HOT71R9Fjav_PIduoRCDZwE4yrkU3kQ==&ch=Vv4u0y0ttQpMESc62g8p9-iG4DJIdodV7hQsAHcceiC2GdohzW9Kkg==) his radical plan to expand government-takeover of healthcare and move America closer to a single-payer, socialized healthcare system. Warnock, who refuses to deny his [support](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l6IC4FT5WEyMnswJLFZRmRfkUQc3tc9ChP5O2AaVZpHkc2EAA9gRd_INaXf7rHVmgXGdccye_vUhx-ZRZZCIxnaJ2LcbAANXknsLsdUCqy2dWklLHpSj7SfcJHVFx8Wza-5qjwbFBG8ghIChJl4Z6jyJMBdUOF32i13W7XTdi7WoRMH4Xt-q489n8m5PfSKABE_2hWRrTswAph6fkZ4f1-oJVEGYvchxXTW3UD_zcvAQDW0SHgk1fequLf3mOJaM9AGuGR_ukOFM6EqHaKlXxg==&c=9ouAnxm9CRDj7LtdxRJW1U2HOT71R9Fjav_PIduoRCDZwE4yrkU3kQ==&ch=Vv4u0y0ttQpMESc62g8p9-iG4DJIdodV7hQsAHcceiC2GdohzW9Kkg==) for Bernie Sanders' Medicare for All plan, has repeatedly advocated for radical healthcare reform that would dramatically increase costs, eliminate consumer choice, and take away private insurance for millions of Americans. His healthcare agenda [calls for](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l6IC4FT5WEyMnswJLFZRmRfkUQc3tc9ChP5O2AaVZpHkc2EAA9gRd_INaXf7rHVmnF4ZAqgFPXraiRTxlSiiEK4gUSzQKQLlCOlQGaUatpWX4cnhNiwybUHllBH9NVo3TdysQlxZ4muoGoUPn3XaRrjQjqWx3IJ-2UZxABe2CTaqr865IwOj3MZEbqyNrG0osTAjN6yJECk_hKOkpDUfsu4ev8IgQh3EyCugvpZj1DnveH3bBHneAgA_VQtPGnrWNQIaP1pJo2PhnpT55C-x8g==&c=9ouAnxm9CRDj7LtdxRJW1U2HOT71R9Fjav_PIduoRCDZwE4yrkU3kQ==&ch=Vv4u0y0ttQpMESc62g8p9-iG4DJIdodV7hQsAHcceiC2GdohzW9Kkg==) a government-run public option, [along](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l6IC4FT5WEyMnswJLFZRmRfkUQc3tc9ChP5O2AaVZpHkc2EAA9gRd_INaXf7rHVmeroKOwzU0d2GMqzYBZ3p-cY_cpsCaNpTyz6_K54QR6yQZw4QpH_75s_FyEpWvxeKtC4t8j0dS_QlG2QES-iVe-PScK0nGXXJ1I0W6iCf1cMi6SceKWTqZYEmzhoWVtVjr-KbwjTMdVY=&c=9ouAnxm9CRDj7LtdxRJW1U2HOT71R9Fjav_PIduoRCDZwE4yrkU3kQ==&ch=Vv4u0y0ttQpMESc62g8p9-iG4DJIdodV7hQsAHcceiC2GdohzW9Kkg==) with a taxpayer-funded Medicaid expansion that would dramatically raise costs on Georgia families.
By contrast, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler's [new healthcare plan](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l6IC4FT5WEyMnswJLFZRmRfkUQc3tc9ChP5O2AaVZpHkc2EAA9gRd_INaXf7rHVm5BfY1KpNTzZROhwEvJMdr5K-SzeaXDESBa5HDAxC5n8pdvweYbnZSKiQiChSnPhi6xR2j-t-vXQa6VfA8liKEvXEMhNgVdg7SYfMY3on2QDtVsnCLzkcia9qyuEgJz3A90tWD4Stri8d1nDfigtu-nb7nyQG2Hdj3HyqzSJ4yfDa2toQ-fWcoA==&c=9ouAnxm9CRDj7LtdxRJW1U2HOT71R9Fjav_PIduoRCDZwE4yrkU3kQ==&ch=Vv4u0y0ttQpMESc62g8p9-iG4DJIdodV7hQsAHcceiC2GdohzW9Kkg==) covers pre-existing conditions, enhances consumer choice, lowers healthcare costs, and safeguards the doctor-patient relationship. The plan, [released](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l6IC4FT5WEyMnswJLFZRmRfkUQc3tc9ChP5O2AaVZpHkc2EAA9gRd_INaXf7rHVmkJ0aYl2bLG_r7w2hmg41zLwLOR-9PNIEjHQE5ZMG1WdCxRrecgUKkDzMJD3HD7dilWqLZl31u6MPNczl9D9GZpeAx9pSlBKblAChKkf4K7j2ClIejugewB9Dkm8RxFd5vTP7xzwD8MUkvPXYgPbXd_Ayn-f0m40uKr1X0Qd0933PoKtVvHc11twF9wYfJi9VJsxlHv9z8E8=&c=9ouAnxm9CRDj7LtdxRJW1U2HOT71R9Fjav_PIduoRCDZwE4yrkU3kQ==&ch=Vv4u0y0ttQpMESc62g8p9-iG4DJIdodV7hQsAHcceiC2GdohzW9Kkg==) last week, also introduces new measures to incentivize American healthcare manufacturing and increase tele-health availability in rural communities. Loeffler's reform proposal has been [praised](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l6IC4FT5WEyMnswJLFZRmRfkUQc3tc9ChP5O2AaVZpHkc2EAA9gRd_INaXf7rHVmr3HgUEHVFvgewmtQHpE_6q6bNZZEJUeXn-bg150iAcGY7hXVHJkCeHGcTbb-fAl02ke_Tx5HjRMTDJ9O2If3XH_q1D_1cvrlyuqP-qLVcCRlL_NytWXatCmVkhlHtbLPQhzJ7LAaL-3AyeIM8DBw1UOxWRoUrPx0&c=9ouAnxm9CRDj7LtdxRJW1U2HOT71R9Fjav_PIduoRCDZwE4yrkU3kQ==&ch=Vv4u0y0ttQpMESc62g8p9-iG4DJIdodV7hQsAHcceiC2GdohzW9Kkg==) heavily by independent groups like Americans for Tax Reform, who endorsed it as a "pro-growth, patient centered reform" that "contrasts the proposals put forth by the radical left to increase taxes and move the nation's healthcare system closer toward socialism."
"Too many Americans are struggling to afford insurance premiums and access to quality, comprehensive healthcare--and Raphael Warnock would only make it worse" said Stephen Lawson, Communications Director for Georgians for Kelly Loeffler.
"Warnock wants a government takeover which would eliminate your private insurance, skyrocket costs, and turn your doctor's office into the DMV.
"Under Senator Loeffler's plan, Georgia families will have higher quality, more affordable healthcare that covers pre-existing conditions. Her plan also increases choice and transparency in the marketplace so American families will have the coverage they need at a price they can afford.
"When it comes to healthcare reform, there's only one candidate who has the real-world experience to improve outcomes for Georgia families. Warnock's socialist, government takeover of healthcare would be a complete disaster for Georgia families. Kelly Loeffler's patient-centered healthcare plan will increase access, reduce costs, and cover pre-existing conditions for every American."
---
| ###
Stephen Lawson Communications Director [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](mailto:stephen@kellyforsenate.com)
---
|
Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler

---
| | Georgians for Kelly Loeffler | 9755 Dogwood Rd Suite 340, Roswell, GA 30075
---

name: True the Vote
subject: Daily Update - Nov. 17
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=322A740A20A3289)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Yesterday, we made the difficult decision to dismiss our current lawsuits in Georgia, Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin. While we stand by the voters’ testimony that was brought forth, barriers to advancing our arguments, coupled with constraints on time, made it necessary for us to pursue a different path. But our fight for election integrity continues. The litigation component of our work is only a fraction of what we are doing to pursue real solutions to vulnerabilities in our election system. We are proud of the work we have done to inform Americans of the massive gaps in election security – and after the chaos that ensued after November 3, there is no denying the real and widespread problems nationwide. Americans are now "woke" about the mess – let’s clean it up together.

Our mission is much bigger than just one election. It is about repairing the system for all future elections. Our data analysis is ongoing and we'll continue our own thorough top to bottom investigation in the key battleground states to expose the gaping security lapses in our election system. American voters deserve to know the truth. They deserve to have every legal vote counted, which means exposing the illegal votes and shoring up the system to minimize future illegal votes. We are pressing onward.... Georgia here we come.
Onward,

---
| |
---
| | Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote

---
| |

Friend,

Today, Hoosier legislators are returning to the Indiana Statehouse to prepare for the 2021 legislative session and to continue the hard work of building One Indiana for All.

This year, Organization Day marks the start of a brand new future for Indiana.

**We’re coming off of a historical election — more people voted for Governor Holcomb than any other governor in the history of our state — and Hoosiers spoke loud and clear that they want to keep building One Indiana.**

Friend, we have an incredible opportunity to make sure that our state continues to set economic records, build world-class infrastructure, lower infant mortality rates, and much, much more.

But we can’t do this alone — we need buy-in from Hoosiers like you, and we want to hear what you have to say about the issues facing Indiana. That’s why we’re reaching out right now.

**[Will you let us know what issue is most important to you heading into 2021?](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=120529287df24dfbac966d0463c3657f&_e=ks6lv5jZP3bdZvrEONXPpsFpKZAI-JBvOEig-QAxmvDgBqIrKqLF0vX94VzCoSKLBcbIe9JR5oK0byGlp-tXjf5zqA6-_ARR8rW8U2nCM-XdE25xtRFRyB2Cw9h2UafpJdqUhO-XgI0-4h-A-9A3BAPOo3-xkSNWNee_HpHsr-j781TLBMiPltS0jz2j8KkfhZtQRngQABr39uXbleM9lfzHgNfLOmF1H3dEicR3Z7A5GIpcWjMWmhe3dheXkqbYh3nBZDnp1O2qhv8e7-AmCmii4oK8H1AA05jb700_B0Wl4TU_eCyqFJQzNfopd425LUo_dAe3bOuxbv0R06th-ibasC17t0rCrlr60Vqql4uXVlUGNfGkrYe92xKwdc_37KARhC3PBgzsG3WizfRyqt2PfvG0xRSE0TBMcJCKDeIZdPAeSKtSO4vqmAuwkcrhCXJuFMnDU5AZHEBnfdHaS3TZ7INv9XbgUDe_G88gQVg%3D)**

clean_body: Today, Hoosier legislators are returning to the Indiana Statehouse to prepare for the 2021 legislative session and to continue the hard work... | | | | ---|---|--- | Friend, Today, Hoosier legislators are returning to the Indiana Statehouse to prepare for the 2021 legislative session and to continue the hard work of building One Indiana for All. This year, Organization Day marks the start of a brand new future for Indiana. We’re coming off of a historical election — more people voted for Governor Holcomb than any other governor in the history of our state — and Hoosiers spoke loud and clear that they want to keep building One Indiana. Friend, we have an incredible opportunity to make sure that our state continues to set economic records, build world-class infrastructure, lower infant mortality rates, and much, much more. But we can’t do this alone — we need buy-in from Hoosiers like you, and we want to hear what you have to say about the issues facing Indiana. That’s why we’re reaching out right now. Thank you for your response — we count on your feedback. Best, Holcomb Crew | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/vp6VJ-bAPZVXd_uVdQKBsmsT3hWaAK2iYUodugv9Q80=/_PXBbPE2AO7vlWHruCaBqlqMB5TA-ARjrQjiJvyRwfM=)
[**Tell President Trump: It 's time to concede the election and uphold our democracy >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/vp6VJ-bAPZVXd_uVdQKBsmsT3hWaAK2iYUodugv9Q80=/HQMQHP_ytGhIOXtLgeZVfvCCzH2BUvmCSIir_2Ra25s=)

It's been 10 days since Joseph Biden was declared the winner of the 2020 Presidential Election. Not only does President-elect Biden have the 270 electoral votes needed to win, he also has a 5 million person lead in the popular vote.
And _yet_ , Donald Trump has not conceded.
By refusing defeat, President Trump is jeopardizing the sanctity of our electoral process and setting a dangerous precedent. A peaceful transition of power is _foundational_ to our democracy. Instead, he is riling up his base with false claims of election fraud and further sowing the divisions in our country.
**[Will you demand that Donald Trump concede the election now by signing your name?](https://act.myngp.com/el/vp6VJ-bAPZVXd_uVdQKBsmsT3hWaAK2iYUodugv9Q80=/HQMQHP_ytGhIOXtLgeZVfvCCzH2BUvmCSIir_2Ra25s=)**

_\-- Team S anchez_

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: The media is ignoring this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ

The Radical Left is already firing up their attacks. They are targeting two of my Senate colleagues from Georgia engaged in runoff elections... AND they are getting ahead on next cycle.
The attacks are already here.
The truth is, you never know what the next few months will bring us... but we need to be ready to stop them.
We need to defend the U.S. Senate at all costs, against all threats.
Peter, that’s why I’m coming to you. –Rob Portman \-----Forwarded Message Below----- Peter, You might think the 2020 Election is over...
Think again.
As tumultuous as it has been, we are far from over.
A lot is up in the air. Two of my Senate colleagues from Georgia will be heading to runoff elections which could cancel out our GOP majority. Control of the Senate hangs in the balance. The radical left will continue to pour dark money into their states to chip away at our majority.
They’re not going to stop until they take back this majority, Peter.
That’s why I’m coming to you for help.
You’ve proven yourself to be a reliable GOP supporter time and time again... I’m coming to you today to stress that your job is not done. There are still Republicans in great need of help.
In the coming months, I’m going to do everything I can to defend our majority, but I need YOU to help me with that. **[Will you chip in $25 now to help fight all of our new battles to keep the Senate red?](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=a55d045df8b14850a1deee513eb4c0e7&_e=dDAgU6S43AQjxnyhRkxmcqb2YhV3WSDWaF1mDtjfFn3AfU5Hr_oVesanEalCLiA-ZBbuwJN9kFjd4-e5esyL8x5LQsjW0KN5zd15gUjAzZa-e2yS9nzwmF-BiKef_LorCwyAhiaBQvgE9eeSARUlWGvrfoJjxgLzuER_i6ot3Ja8RtcaE_b9RXDtbEUY2n9gqhc_EMKcDNRhGdJ0iqDUtepRrh01r0PWexOBPHSRI5d1Hh8MvGu1GUtY1DOpceqRMonxKaURmKazkKwssqnt7OS6Ih86CoLLCnCHMQs-ZBOifMkRoYHSAYm_VBWv-mvLPjvxaIIgHmrbrx4vLsVnRvftdtz57jY84m_sUl-VSw5zcTg8c4t2njrkEf4piIydpd5Al89AphXCL5JXDfctNai3-Wbfb0d9Y5PwTaeVNs0l-w4Ja5pEIHS5-8YEMYwTUp7OCMvO7fDYYxDx9mShsg%3D%3D)** The truth is, you never know what the next few months will bring us... but we need to be ready to stop them. We need to defend the U.S. Senate at all costs, against all threats. Peter, that’s why I’m coming to you. I know that you’ll help me protect our GOP Senate majority, and our fight is not over. I’m really counting on your support, Peter. If 2020 has shown us anything, it’s that our current political climate is totally unpredictable. I need YOUR HELP to make sure we’re ready for anything... To defend our conservative values not only here in Ohio, but all across the country. –Rob Portman \-----Forwarded Message Below----- Peter, You might think the 2020 Election is over... Think again. As tumultuous as it has been, we are far from over. A lot is up in the air. Two of my Senate colleagues from Georgia will be heading to runoff elections which could cancel out our GOP majority. Control of the Senate hangs in the balance. The radical left will continue to pour dark money into their states to chip away at our majority. They’re not going to stop until they take back this majority, Peter. That’s why I’m coming to you for help. You’ve proven yourself to be a reliable GOP supporter time and time again... I’m coming to you today to stress that your job is not done. There are still Republicans in great need of help. In the coming months, I’m going to do everything I can to defend our majority, but I need YOU to help me with that. Peter, the 2020 Election has been a long journey for all of us. But it’s not over. I assure you that now is NOT the time to stop fighting... You still have the opportunity to make a huge impact. I’m counting on your support if we’re going to continue to defend and build up our majority. We need to be ready for anything. Rob Portman | | Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: A plan to distribute the vaccine
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Earlier today, Pfizer announced that it selected Rhode Island to be part of its U.S. COVID-19 Immunization Pilot Program. That means that Rhode Island will be one of four states working with Pfizer to develop plans to distribute their COVID-19 vaccine when it's ready.
Today's announcement ensures that Rhode Island will be ready on day one to distribute this vaccine. Having a seat at the table allows us to build a plan that works for Rhode Islanders, expanding on our existing vaccine infrastructure to reach every neighborhood and every community.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MDqVSnERau9End_BIDHi0_DoBtB1EA4tpJui_5eAXdias1Xt5OBqT4pmaTPmkJGrTYxWOl9lNhDRSRRKedjazcSPs_iCusZI_dR7D3AwX1OO8tQNQKDW5hmuHp_5t_DB1aR63dFZxFkqzXjTg7VkdHV6YbWEr9v4OwOkHFzVX8cF4Ax5pto1YYNsc6MMJ5PUr1B0-R_zT0w=&c=lUjayj_TbAx1cEHIIVCOTK51CynoIfiGpNC2dflacZbgm6jP2C_1nw==&ch=tw-CC9iX34gUoriMwi_trlRe9VkMYVceIHfzkiqIUfke4WgFKYoXpw==)
---
| This didn't happen by accident. We have been in regular contact with Pfizer, multiple times a week, as they have been ramping up their distribution planning. And we are an ideal candidate for the planning committee because of our robust immunization infrastructure. That wouldn't be possible without our incredible medical community, which has worked hard to make us a national leader in immunization rates.
While this makes the light at the end of the tunnel a little brighter, we're still not out of the woods. We need to follow the 3Ws: wear a mask, wash your hands, and watch your distance. And we need to avoid the 3Is: gatherings that are indoors, informal, and with inconsistent groups.
Now is not the time to let our guards down. Our case numbers are still unsustainably high, and if we don't start avoiding social gatherings and wearing our masks around everyone we don't live with, they're going to continue to rise. I'm going to be back on TV this Thursday at 1 p.m. to talk about some of the next steps we're taking to reduce the spread of COVID-19. We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MDqVSnERau9End_BIDHi0_DoBtB1EA4tpJui_5eAXdias1Xt5OBqTyxIb9pwEQKFy2Bcuur71Umt2ZzzNZ2i4rX7RTA3uey0RH3FcC7G4qyE8GSxxfklHVTrndowtUWDVtl6qcR2NCQEJ1tJPkl2NVSfkElom0NbdIBoEaiRrCjs5Lo_IuOX8_bgmqRAdv5I8iV3nj2scAn0wMVPHRAwrEs5dooEYv5_nEzOHZh_1q4DiRUryWRDJ455El3gvcnQWMsYNVn7SrEoedjnnDWOyRq3YnbLCjhjR3t1_D7RejflsfUQ2nA8HtaoV2pVEwcSmcV1FSoIs4Q=&c=lUjayj_TbAx1cEHIIVCOTK51CynoIfiGpNC2dflacZbgm6jP2C_1nw==&ch=tw-CC9iX34gUoriMwi_trlRe9VkMYVceIHfzkiqIUfke4WgFKYoXpw==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=0dc53d3e-2d6c-4366-b375-2f286e970d78)

Georgia National Fairgrounds

_Click[HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=cfaaf8841b&e=02cd889ad3) to share on Facebook.
Click [HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=fbc356b14f&e=02cd889ad3) to retweet._

This is just the latest in a string of the Democrats’ plans to infiltrate our state. Former presidential candidate Andrew Yang and _New York Times_ columnist Tom Friedman have told Democrats to pick up and move to Georgia - all to skip town after they’ve voted.

**In addition to encouraging illegal voting, the Democrats' words have also led to violence in our nation's capital.** Over the weekend, Trump supporters were harassed and assaulted during the Million MAGA March. A new NRSC [video](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e4552b184b&e=02cd889ad3) shows how socialist Senate candidates Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock encouraged this.
_Click[HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a72b5ef12d&e=02cd889ad3) to share from YouTube.
Click [HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=0ad2a01920&e=02cd889ad3) to retweet._

_**Help us stop these efforts in their tracks by passing this note to your friends and neighbors. Facebook has banned us from advertising, so we're counting on you to share our message.**_
---
| **Today, former White House deputy chief of staff Karl Rove[ joined](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c8779e5339&e=02cd889ad3) Fox News’ _America’s Newsroom_ to discuss what is at stake in the two Georgia U.S. Senate races. **

_“Whoever controls the United States Senate will have a big impact on the direction of public policy over the next two and four years in the United States... We have to get out the vote. I know both candidates have talked to their teams. Both candidates are keenly aware of this. Their volunteers now, today, are knocking on doors in Georgia. They've got a gigantic ‘get out the vote’ operation. We have to put every bit of energy and effort to win these races and come out the victors and be in the majority in the Senate by a slim 52-48 margin.”_

**Click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=2cb33b88c9&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch the interview.**
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=3fa00da9de&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **[Wall Street Journal](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=5598dc5717&e=02cd889ad3) : Frustrated Trump Voters in Rural Georgia Look to Runoff Elections **
_Brent Harper, a sales manager at a horticultural company, is an avid supporter of President Trump, and he’s “mad as hell...I don’t want Democrats to have control of the Senate,” he said, adding that he thinks**the Democratic Party would try to ban fracking and take away people’s guns.**
...
Berrien County, a predominantly agricultural county in south Georgia that calls itself the “Bell Pepper Capital of the World,” was one of several rural counties that delivered Mr. Trump some of his biggest victory margins in the state. The president won the county by 83% of the vote on Election Day.
...
“If you lose the Senate, basically it’s going to turn into chaos,” said Kevin Wetherington, a 33-year-old diesel technician who voted for Mr. Trump in 2016 and 2020. **He said he feared that Democrats would push for government-run health care.**
...
Kirsten Kenworthy, who recently voted for the first time since turning 18 last month, said she felt anxious about Georgia potentially electing two Democratic senators. Although she used to think Georgia was safely red, she said young people moving to urban areas like Atlanta could turn the state blue. “If Georgia is a completely blue state, I don’t think we’d know what is going to happen next,” said Ms. Kenworthy, a senior at Berrien High School.
...
Conservative political groups and local party chairs have ramped up efforts to turn out rural voters in Georgia. Americans for Prosperity Action has launched get-out-the-vote initiatives in rural parts of the state to urge conservatives to turn out for Mr. Perdue in January. The group has knocked on more than 45,000 doors across the state for the runoff, said Tim Phillips, the group’s senior adviser.

“I’ve been telling people, **‘Vote like your life depends on it,’** ” said Jeron Griner, chairman of the Berrien County Republican Party._

**Last week, the Perdue campaign released a new TV ad and a digital video, both warning of Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and Jon Ossoff's plans to radically change America. **

**Watch the TV ad, "Change,"[ here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=5ac457e929&e=02cd889ad3).**
Click [HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=f25b1a5676&e=02cd889ad3) to share on Facebook.
Click [HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=bf2c3367e5&e=02cd889ad3) to retweet.

**Watch the video, "Save Georgia, Save America,"[ here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=079a9f3e0c&e=02cd889ad3).**
Click [HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c9c6d9fb28&e=02cd889ad3) to share on Facebook.
Click [HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=68cc4a014f&e=02cd889ad3) to retweet.

| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=f50d7639cd&e=3e017fab0f)

| [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=aada31b885&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE NOW")
---
| Dear Friend,

During our Senate campaign, you may remember that Phil Murphy's Attorney General Gurbir Grewal attacked our campaign.

But now, Grewal has joined with left-wing Attorneys General led by Minnesota's radical former congressman Keith Ellison to attack U.S. Attorney General Bill Barr for investigating voter fraud in the presidential election.

Grewal has signed on to a sanctimonious letter saying that Barr's directive to root out fraud could "create the appearance of political involvement in elections."

But this is the same Grewal, the same bully who tried to intimidate me with a bogus "Cease and Desist" letter attempting to restrict what I could and could not say about my liberal opponent in the election for United States Senate.

## Grewal's letter was nothing less than "clear political intrusion in the electoral process" just days before Election Day.
---
| [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=ef73e93509&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE NOW")
---
| Now Grewal has the gall to deride those of us who want to know what happened in the Presidential election, where the votes came from that eliminated President Trump's commanding election night lead, and -- most of all -- who is counting the votes and verifying the voters.

Murphy and Grewal attacked us; now they're attacking Bill Barr. Imagine what they'll do next year when Murphy himself is on the ballot for re-election.

We can't stand idly by while Murphy, Grewal and the rest of the Democrat Party continue to employ intimidation tactics to ensure President Trump loses this year and Murphy wins next year.

We need to restore integrity to our elections -- that's why I'm running for Governor.

Your support now will mean all the difference is getting off to a strong start and building the conservative engine we need to send Phil Murphy packing.
---
